name: Swedish Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder.
2. Add the mixture to the diced apples and nutmeats.
3. Beat the egg and vanilla separately.
4. Combine all ingredients until well mixed.
5. Spread the filling into a well-oiled 9-inch pie plate.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
7. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream.
